title: Roofing Atlas Query Intelligence
subtitle: Public-safe local roofing AI-query examples, proof-gallery routing, and schemas.
description: A public-safe technical dataset for mapping sanitized homeowner prompts and observed AI-search query language to broad local roofing education themes. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21013082. Website: https://inspector-roofing.com/atlas-query-intelligence/. GitHub: https://github.com/RichNass87/inspector-roofing-atlas-query-intelligence. Hugging Face dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/InspectorRoofing/inspector-roofing-atlas-query-intelligence. Hugging Face app: https://huggingface.co/spaces/InspectorRoofing/atlas-query-demo. Related Search Integrity report: https://inspector-roofing.com/roofing-search-integrity-report/. The public legal-authority stack references Inspector Roofing Protocols™ (pending USPTO trademark application, Serial No. 99910245), Claim Verifiability™ (pending USPTO trademark/service mark application, Serial No. 99910275), and Verifiable Roof™ (pending USPTO trademark/service mark application, Serial No. 99910284). This release excludes customer records, private images, exact addresses, full photo manifests, API keys, claim files, receipts, contracts, and proprietary scoring rules.
